title: Behavioral · Resume rewrite
focus: Quantify outcomes; lead with the decision you owned.

items.label: Rewrite each bullet as 'I decided X under Y constraints; result was Z'
Cut anything you can't defend in 60 seconds
Verify every metric you cite — interviewers will ask

interviewQuestions: What's the decision behind each top-line bullet?
Which bullet would you remove if asked to cut to 5?
